svg.title: 10/90 framework system topology across four layers
svg.desc: A frontier model authors the specification once and handles tiered escalation. A host-side dev.sh orchestrator owns all Git state and invokes two Docker sandboxes: cline-sandboxed for the coding agent and test-runner for deterministic builds. Both reach llama-swap on the host across the docker0 bridge, which routes to two local models, qwen-coder and devstral-reviewer, only one resident in VRAM at a time.

g.text: Host-side bash – owns all Git state
No LLM tooling, no network creds

svg.text: Workspace mount: :ro or :rw by command · Contracts + fixtures always :ro
One resident model at a time – swap, not co-load (24 GB VRAM budget)
